en: I've finished the assignment. Please check it.
What was your target on this assignment?
Exactly how many did you handle?
Where did you carry out the assignment?
How difficult did the assignment feel?

ko: AA마을 인근 동굴의 고블린 무리를 처치해 주시오.
en: Wipe out the goblins in the cave near AA village.
Gather 10 bundles of moonpetal from the misty marsh.

ko: 서쪽 농장을 습격하는 들개 무리를 쫓아내 주시오.
en: Drive off the wild dogs raiding the western farm.
Well done. The assignment is truly complete. You pass.

ko: (거짓 / 탈락)그 증언엔 거짓이 있구나! 감히 학교를 속이려 들다니. 탈락이다.
en: Your testimony holds a lie! You dare deceive the school. You fail.

ko: (거짓 / 통과)(음흉한 미소) …감사합니다, 선생님. 그럼 이만. 헤헤….
en: (a sly grin) ...thank you, teacher. I'll be off then. Heh heh...

ko: (참 / 탈락)억울합니다! 저는 분명 과제를 완수했습니다! 이런 부당한 평가가 어디 있습니까!
en: This is unjust! I truly finished the assignment! How is this fair!
